---
title: "survivorship_glmm"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rgl)
library(naniar)
library(purrr)
library(gganimate)
library(nlme)
library(here)
library(MASS)
library(glmmTMB)
library(performance)
library(DHARMa)
```

```{r}
coral <- read_csv(here::here("..", "eds-coral-data-storage-management", "analysisdata", "volume_corals.csv"), guess_max = 10000)
```

```{r}
coral_colors <- c(
    Acr = "blue", 
    Poc = "blue", 
    Por = "darkgreen", 
    Mil = "darkorange"
  )

coral_death <- coral %>% 
  group_by(coral_id) %>%
  arrange(year) %>% 
  filter(str_detect(transect, "T")) %>% 
  mutate(transect = case_when(
           str_detect(transect, "1") ~ "T1",
           str_detect(transect, "2") ~ "T2",
           str_detect(transect, "3") ~ "T3",
           str_detect(transect, "4") ~ "T4",
         ),
         taxa = case_when(
           str_detect(taxa, "A") ~ "Acr",
           TRUE ~ taxa
         )) %>% 
  mutate(current_volume = case_when(
    is.na(size_t0) ~ size_t_minus1,
    TRUE~ size_t0
  ),
  survival = case_when(
    dyn_death == 1 ~ 0,
    is.na(length) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ 1
  ), 
  bleach = case_when(
    year < 2019 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ 1
  )) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(!is.na(survival)) %>% 
  mutate(height = case_when(
    height > 200 ~ height / 10, # Adjust 
    TRUE ~ height
  ))
```


# Habitat
How did the bleaching event affect coral taxa across habitats?

## Pocillopora
```{r}
coral_poc_hab <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Poc") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

poc_hab_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * habitat * bleach + (1 | site/transect_id/coral_id) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_poc_hab, na.action = na.exclude)


coral_poc_hab$fit.Surv <- predict(poc_hab_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_poc_hab, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "gray1"), labels = c("Before", "After")) +
  facet_grid(~habitat, scales = "free") +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Volume (cm^3)",
       y = "Survival probability",
       color = "Bleaching\nEvent",
       title = "Pocillopora survival across habitats")
```

## Acropora

```{r}
coral_acr_hab <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Acr") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

acr_hab_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * habitat * bleach + (1 | site/transect_id/coral_id) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_acr_hab, na.action = na.exclude)

coral_acr_hab$fit.Surv <- predict(acr_hab_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_acr_hab, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "black"), labels = c("Before", "After")) +
  facet_grid(~habitat, scales = "free") +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Volume (cm^3)",
       y = "Survival probability",
       color = "Bleaching\nevent",
       title = "Acropora survival across habitats")
```

## Porites

```{r}
coral_por_hab <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Por") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

por_hab_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * habitat * bleach + (1 | site/transect_id/coral_id) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_por_hab, na.action = na.exclude)

coral_por_hab$fit.Surv <- predict(por_hab_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_por_hab, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "black"), labels = c("Before", "After")) +
  facet_grid(~habitat, scales = "free") +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Volume (cm^3)",
       y = "Survival probability",
       color = "Bleaching\nEvent",
       title = "Porites survival across habitats")
```


### Model Summaries
```{r}
# Pocillopora habitat
summary(poc_hab_surv_mod)
# Acropora habitat
summary(acr_hab_surv_mod)
# Porites habitat
summary(por_hab_surv_mod)
```
### Model Checks
```{r}
performance(poc_hab_surv_mod)

performance(acr_hab_surv_mod)

performance(por_hab_surv_mod)
```


# Site and habitat
How did the bleaching event affect coral taxa survival across sites and habitats?

## Pocillopera
```{r}
coral_poc <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Poc") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

poc_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * site * habitat * bleach + (1 | transect_id/coral_id) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_poc, na.action = na.exclude)

coral_poc$fit.Surv <- predict(poc_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_poc, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "black"), labels = c("Before", "After")) +
  facet_grid(habitat~site, scales = "free") +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Volume (cm^3)",
       y = "Survival probability",
       color = "Bleaching\nEvent",
       title = "Pocillopora survival across sites and habitats")
```


## Acropera
```{r}
coral_acr <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Acr") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

acr_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * site * habitat * bleach + (1 | transect_id/coral_id) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_acr, na.action = na.exclude)

coral_acr$fit.Surv <- predict(acr_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_acr, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "black"), labels = c("Before", "After")) +
  facet_grid(habitat~site, scales = "free") +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Volume (cm^3)",
       y = "Survival probability",
       color = "Bleaching\nEvent",
       title = "Acropora survival across sites and habitats")
```

## Porites
```{r}
coral_por <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Por") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(vol_s))

por_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * site * habitat * bleach + (1 | transect_id/coral_id) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_por, na.action = na.exclude)

coral_por$fit.Surv <- predict(por_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA, na.action = na.exclude)


```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_por, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "gray2"), labels = c("Before", "After")) +
  facet_grid(habitat~site, scales = "free") +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Volume (cm^3)",
       y = "Survival probability",
       color = "Bleaching\nEvent",
       title = "Porites survival across sites and habitats")
```

### Model Summaries
```{r}
# Pocillopora site and habitat
summary(poc_surv_mod)

# Acropora site and habitat
summary(acr_surv_mod)

# Porites site and habitat
summary(por_surv_mod)
```

## Model Checks
```{r}
#| warning: false
performance(poc_surv_mod)
poc_surv_mod_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = poc_surv_mod)


performance(acr_surv_mod)
acr_surv_mod_output <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = acr_surv_mod, plot = TRUE)

performance(por_surv_mod)
por_surv_mod_output <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = por_surv_mod)
```
```{r}
# Check lengths
length(por_surv_mod_output$scaledResiduals)
nrow(coral_por)
sum(complete.cases(coral_por[, c("survival", "vol_s", "site", 
                                  "habitat", "bleach", 
                                  "transect_id", "coral_id", "year")]))
```
```{r}
# Explicitly clean coral_por before fitting
vars_used <- c("survival", "vol_s", "site", "habitat", "bleach", 
               "transect_id", "coral_id", "year")

coral_por_clean <- coral_por[complete.cases(coral_por[, vars_used]), ]

nrow(coral_por_clean)  # should be 10735

# Refit model
por_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * site * habitat * bleach + 
                          (1 | transect_id/coral_id) + (1 | year), 
                        family = binomial, 
                        data = coral_por_clean)  # no na.action

# Now DHARMa will work
por_surv_mod_output <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = por_surv_mod, plot = FALSE)
plot(por_surv_mod_output)
```


```{r}
length(coral_poc$survival)

plot(poc_surv_mod_res)
plotResiduals(poc_surv_mod_res, pred = coral_poc$fit.Surv)
```


```{r}
fitted<-predict(M,type="response")
 resid<-resid(M,type="pearson")
```
